questionHtml:
The image shows variation in height of adult humans.

What can explain the variation?

A.  One pair of alleles and age

B.  Polygenic inheritance and nutrition

C.  Nutrition and age

D.  Autosomal inheritance only

meta.title: The image shows variation in height of adult humans. What can explain the variation? A. One pair of alleles and age B. Polygenic inheritance and nutrition C. Nutrition and age D. A
